summary: M3 (Skill validation and packaging): Added scripts/validate-skill.py to validate skill folder structure (SKILL.md frontmatter, agents/openai.yaml) and scripts/package-skill.py to produce skill.zip archives. Packaging runs validation first and rejects symlinks and out-of-tree paths. Both scripts registered in manifest and default profile. Packaging flow documented in META_SPEC.md. Architecture red-team caught two blocking issues (symlink traversal, dead __pycache__ filter) — both fixed. Code-reviewer approved.
changes: Updated capabilities/project-capabilities.yaml (added validate-skill and package-skill entries)
Updated docs/META_SPEC.md (added validation and packaging flow documentation)
reviewer_notes: Red-team blocking: symlink traversal in zip creation — fixed with is_symlink() and is_relative_to() checks
Red-team blocking: __pycache__ filter was dead code — fixed to check path parts
Non-blocking: duplicated load_manifest/resolve_skill_dir across scripts (acceptable at this scale)
Non-blocking: validation is shallow (SKILL.md + openai.yaml only) — sufficient for M3, can deepen later
suggested_commit_message: meta-M3: add skill validation and packaging scripts
